title: Sword Utils
description: Customize you sword how you like
body:
If you've ever had a pvp or survival texture pack and not liked the smaller sword size then use this texure pack over that one and ur swords will be normal sized and many more!

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a50635786fdb71d5a3e5338833b2923f7d40a01.png)
